context.problem_statement: Write compelling marketing emails using Andre Chaperon's methodology with SlideHeroes-specific voice and context. Consolidate existing scattered components into a single portable skill.
context.distinctiveness: Combines methodology + corpus + voice + tools in single portable package. No other skill provides complete email marketing system with: - 83+ annotated examples - SlideHeroes-specific POVs - Two-stage workflow (strategy → execution) - Hook quality scoring system

architecture.pattern_rationale: The skill has distinct phases (strategy → execution) and produces verifiable artifacts (YAML files) that benefit from validation scripts.
architecture.directory_structure: email-marketing/ ├── SKILL.md # Main entry point ├── commands/ # Portable command files │ ├── email-campaign.md # Strategy workflow │ └── email-write.md # Execution workflow ├── core/ # Methodology (always loaded) │ ├── techniques.yaml # 24 techniques, 7 categories │ ├── hooks-library.yaml # 45 hooks, 8 categories │ ├── best-examples.yaml # 12 gold standard emails │ └── principles.md # Andre's 7 core principles ├── context/ # SlideHeroes-specific │ ├── slideheroes-product.yaml # Product positioning │ ├── presentation-povs.yaml # 32 POVs for hooks │ └── ai-presentation-povs.yaml# AI+presentations POVs ├── corpus/ # Full email collection │ ├── by-type/ # Organized by email type │ │ ├── welcome/ │ │ ├── nurture/ │ │ ├── story/ │ │ ├── sales/ │ │ ├── newsletter/ │ │ └── onboarding/ │ └── campaigns/ # Organized by campaign │ └── bpm-onboarding/ │ └── _campaign.yaml ├── tools/ # Export tool (TypeScript) │ ├── package.json │ ├── tsconfig.json │ ├── src/ │ │ ├── index.ts │ │ ├── gmail-client.ts │ │ ├── yaml-writer.ts │ │ └── html-to-text.ts │ └── README.md ├── scripts/ # Automation scripts │ ├── validate_email.py # Email style validation │ ├── score_hook.py # Hook quality scoring │ └── organize_corpus.py # Corpus management └── references/ ├── setup-guide.md # New machine setup └── loading-strategy.md # When to load what

phase.name: Campaign Strategy
phase.output: Strategy YAML with hooks and arc

decision_summary.rationale: Email quality can be objectively validated against style criteria. Hook scoring has clear weighted formula. Both are repeatable and benefit from automation.

script.name: validate_email.py
script.purpose: Check email against Andre's style patterns

script.name: organize_corpus.py
script.purpose: Organize imported emails into corpus structure

agentic_capabilities.autonomous: Email validation can run without human input

evolution_analysis.timelessness_rationale: - Core methodology (Andre Chaperon) is timeless relationship-based approach - SlideHeroes content is easily swappable for other brands - Email as medium isn't going away - Two-stage workflow is principle-based, not tool-dependent - Gmail API may change but export format (YAML) is stable

extension_points.point: Add new POV files for additional products
Expand corpus with new campaign types

obsolescence_triggers.trigger: Major shift away from email marketing
Gmail API breaking changes requiring rewrite
Claude context limits preventing corpus loading

pattern.name: Hardcoded paths
pattern.alternative: All paths relative to skill root

pattern.name: Symlinks for corpus
pattern.alternative: Copy actual files into skill directory

pattern.name: Loading full corpus always
pattern.alternative: Load on-demand based on email type

pattern.name: External dependencies in scripts
pattern.why_avoid: May not be available on new machine
pattern.alternative: Python stdlib only with graceful fallbacks

criterion.description: Skill can be copied to new machine and work immediately
criterion.verification: Copy to temp directory, invoke triggers, verify commands load
Count files in corpus/, verify no broken symlinks

criterion.description: Hook scoring produces correct weighted totals
criterion.verification: Run score_hook.py with known inputs, verify output

criterion.description: Email validation catches missing mandatory elements
criterion.verification: Run validate_email.py on email without P.S., verify failure
